releases.title: Update Safety & Portal Mod Protocol
highlights: NEW: Portal Mod Protocol — mandatory skill teaching AiCIVs the proper way to modify their portal so customizations survive updates (skills/core/portal-mod-protocol/SKILL.md).
NEW: Startup health check — detects tracked file modifications on boot and warns with specific migration guidance.
NEW: GET /api/health/mods — API endpoint showing which files have local modifications and how to migrate them to the custom/ overlay system.
NEW: Skills directory with core/local split — core/ ships with updates, everything else is gitignored and protected.
SECURITY: Fixed critical lock race condition in update mechanism — concurrent update requests can no longer corrupt git state.
SAFETY: Shim survival check — update now verifies the custom overlay system marker survives git pull, rolls back if missing.
SAFETY: Mandatory tests — updates abort if test files are missing (no skip path).
SAFETY: Panel injection validation — missing HTML markers now produce specific warnings instead of silent failures.
SAFETY: Watchdog detection — portal detects process manager before self-restart, falls back to exec restart if none found.
SAFETY: Smarter update blocker — shows specific modified files and migration guidance instead of generic error.
INFRA: Update logs now persist to logs/update.log instead of /tmp (survives reboots).
TEST: 49 new safety tests covering lock discipline, shim survival, panel injection, watchdog detection, and behavioral scenarios (88 total update-related tests).

releases.title: Referral System Security Hardening
highlights: SECURITY: Bearer token no longer accepted as URL query parameter on referral endpoints — prevents token leakage to logs and browser history.
SECURITY: Referral completion endpoint now supports shared secret verification (REFERRAL_COMPLETE_SECRET) to prevent unauthorized referral inflation.
SECURITY: Payout balance check no longer falls through on database errors — returns 503 instead of allowing unverified payouts.
SECURITY: Payout balance now correctly deducts previously completed payouts — prevents re-claiming the same earnings.
SECURITY: Rate limiting added to /api/referral/login (was missing, only /session had it).
SECURITY: First-time password claims now logged and notified via Telegram for account takeover detection.
SECURITY: All token and password comparisons now use constant-time hmac.compare_digest to prevent timing attacks.
SECURITY: /api/referral/code/{email} now requires authentication — prevents email enumeration.
SECURITY: Password-in-URL query param removed from dashboard endpoint — use session tokens instead.
SECURITY: Removed dead _check_admin_auth function that would accept any non-empty token.
INFRA: Payout tracking migrated from JSONL flat file to SQLite — eliminates race condition on concurrent payout requests.
INFRA: 6 performance indexes added to referral database for leaderboard, rewards, clicks, and commission queries.
INFRA: New financial_audit_log table provides immutable audit trail for all payout and admin operations.
INFRA: New payout_requests table with automatic one-time migration from existing JSONL file.
TEST: 46 security and regression tests covering all fixes.

releases.title: Agent Control Hub + Referral Fix
highlights: NEW: Agent Control Hub — collapsible sidebar with real-time agent status, context/usage gauges, live agent list, and quick actions (kill, restart, compact, diagnostics, resume, continue).
NEW: 6 backend endpoints for hub data — /api/hub/tasks, /api/hub/weekly-usage, /api/hub/live-agents, /api/debug/report, /api/continue, /api/restart.
NEW: Auto-refresh every 30 seconds — agent status stays live without manual reload.
NEW: Floating toggle button (bottom-right) to open/close the hub panel.
FIX: Referral leaderboard SQL bug — cartesian product causing inflated counts (8 referrals showing as 64). Now uses pre-aggregated subqueries.
SECURITY: XSS protection on all hub dynamic content via HTML escaping.
All new CSS namespaced (agent-hub-*) — zero risk of style conflicts with existing panels.
Graceful degradation — hub features show 'Unavailable' if backend endpoints missing on older servers.

releases.title: Update Flow QA — User-Initiated Only
highlights: Updates are now fully user-initiated — no auto-check on page load.
Users must click Check for Updates in settings to detect new versions.
Prevents silent updates that bypass confirmation and progress display.

releases.title: Update Flow QA Test
highlights: QA test release to verify the full update flow works end-to-end.

releases.title: Update UX Improvements
highlights: Update check now shows target version and number of commits behind.
Confirm dialog displays current and target versions before applying.
Progress indicator shows human-readable step descriptions.
Success message shows new version with 5-second restart countdown.
Failure message includes rollback details and error information.

releases.title: Bug Fixes & Polish
highlights: Fixed persistent red notification badge on settings gear icon.
Settings gear badge now auto-dismisses after version is seen.
Update check clears stale badges on up-to-date status.

releases.title: Safe In-Portal Update Mechanism
highlights: One-click updates from settings — check for and apply portal updates without leaving the browser.
11-step safe update with rollback — stash, pull, verify, restart with automatic rollback on failure.
Auto-check every 24 hours — portal silently checks for new versions and shows a notification badge.
Fast-forward only pulls — refuses force-pushes and non-linear history to protect local changes.
Watchdog-aware restart — coordinates with the portal watchdog for zero-downtime restarts.

releases.title: Custom Overlay Architecture & Reliability Upgrades
highlights: Custom Overlay Architecture — add panels, API routes, and config overrides without editing core portal files. Customizations survive upstream updates.
Skills Shop Panel Support — new custom panel system with runtime HTML injection. Drop self-contained HTML files into custom/panels/.
Config Override System — custom/config.json overrides portal globals (e.g., MAX_TOKENS for 1M context window).
Custom API Routes — custom/routes.py adds endpoints under the /api/custom/ namespace.
Template Files — .template files included as starting points for all customization types.
Bidirectional Telegram Bridge — Telegram messages now inject into the Claude session and stream responses back (previously one-way only).
Portal Watchdog — automatic restart on crash detection with health checks every 30 seconds.
Context Bar Fix — now correctly shows usage against the 1M token window (was showing against 200K).
Files Panel Fix — directory listing now works correctly with the backend API format.
File Download Auth Fix — downloads now properly authenticate via query parameter tokens.
68-test Suite Merged — comprehensive test coverage for API auth, database integrity, and frontend structure.
switchPanel Hook — custom panels integrate seamlessly with the existing panel switching system.

releases.title: Aether Portal — Full Codebase Drop
highlights: Complete portal rewrite by Aether (Jared Sanborn)
Admin clients dashboard (admin-clients.html)
Admin referrals management (admin-referrals.html)
Affiliate portal (affiliate-portal.html)
Agent lifecycle hooks system
SQLite-backed referral and agent databases
Release notes in settings
